'''Crseih''' was a crystallized [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] that was swallowed by a [[Crseih black hole|black hole]]. Influenced by the extra-dimensional entity [[Waru]], Crseih disrupted [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] when in close proximity. It was destroyed in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] when it collapsed into the black hole.

{{Star-stub}}
